name: Danske Invest Global Indeks Akk KL DKK h
summary: Danske Invest Global Indeks Akk KL DKK h is an accumulating global equity index fund. It aims to replicate the performance of a broad global equity market index, with returns reinvested within the fund, denominated in DKK. The fund is managed by Danske Invest and suitable for investors seeking long-term growth in global equities.
